title: Reference attach: tokens -> chat metadata -> run context (FC-400/401/411/412; D4)

tests.summary: 3 passed (empty renders nothing, one PT line with tool+refs+labels, quote escaping)

e2e.summary: full flow: connected state -> picker unavailable -> typed fallback -> FC-411 verbatim consent -> token chip -> request carries references (validated against shared schema) -> chip clears; zero console errors (scoped ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED allowance = the test stimulus)

review.notes: refs opaque (S1), labels quote-escaped into ONE context line, line suppressed when tool unmounted (attachments variant); FC-412 card pre-existing, acceptance-verified; builder-panel reference stays dormant (no onReferenceCreated) - noted

designAudit.notes: token chips mirror AttachmentChips pattern in teal accent; dialogs reuse the ui system
